svg.title: Playwright Option B — full browser automation flow for Kleinanzeigen ad reposting
svg.desc: Three phases: setup (login once, save session), fetch ads (scrape your listings page), repost (delete old ad, re-create it). Each phase shown as a column of steps with decision branches.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do I run the Playwright login script?')
sendPrompt('What does the Playwright browser window look like during login?')
sendPrompt('Where are the session cookies saved?')
sendPrompt('How often do I need to redo the login?')
sendPrompt('What URL does Playwright open to fetch my ads?')
sendPrompt('Which page does Playwright navigate to for my listings?')
sendPrompt('How does Playwright scrape my ad titles and IDs?')
sendPrompt('What does the saved ads JSON look like?')
sendPrompt('How does the scheduler decide which ad to repost?')
sendPrompt('How does Playwright open and delete the ad?')
sendPrompt('How does Playwright fill in the new ad form?')
sendPrompt('How does Playwright submit the new ad?')
sendPrompt('What happens after the ad is reposted successfully?')

svg.text: Click any box to ask about that step →
